prompt: TRUE chunky pixel art talent emblem ONLY on an exact 32×32 logical pixel grid rendered large; every logical pixel one clean flat square block — uniform square pixel blocks only, no smaller detail, smooth gradient, anti-aliasing, blur, or dithering. A single centered storybook night-garden fantasy emblem in three-quarter display angle: a rugged FOREARM BRACER / WRIST GUARD made of overlapping layered MINT LEAF ARMOUR PLATES — clearly a wearable cuff around a wrist silhouette, NOT a scroll, NOT a roll, NOT a bandage bundle. Show distinct overlapping leaf scales (mint / sage / mint-shadow) wrapping a cylinder cuff, with a plum-magenta buckle strap and cream buckle pin across the front. Keep the entire emblem well inside the frame with generous empty magenta margin — at least four full magenta cells of clearance on every edge. Flat solid magenta #ff00ff background filling the entire canvas, nothing else in frame. Use only mint / berry / cream / plum Moonberry colours (8–12 flat colours). No brown, tan, cyan, pure white, or pure black. Structural members at least 3 logical pixels thick. No shadow, glow, sparkle, particles, text, watermark, or transparency.
note: #612 Hunter Tier-3 Talent / Ability Talent one-variant icon (rework for bracer identity)
